title: BSNL – Junior Telecom Officer – 100 Posts
shortInfo: BSNL Junior Telecom Officer Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 100 vacancies across India. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E, M.Sc Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 04-06-2026, and closes on 03-07-2026. The candidate shall apply online through BSNL website, bsnl.co.in.

basic_details.job_title: BSNL JTO Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 100 Junior Telecom Officer Posts

salary_details.pay_scale: IDA Pay Scale [E-1] of ₹16,400 – ₹40,500/- (2nd PRC pay scale w.e.f. 01.01.2007)

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must complete the online registration process as follows:
